title: MCFMR Better Remote
description: A Better Remote for MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod Refurbished
body:
This mod is an addon for MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod Refurbished (not available on modrinth [yet?]) It is available on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture/files/6623961) and [his website](https://dashboard.mrcrayfish.com/mods/refurbished_furniture/download/38da22a32b9a60d646d3b3e85ed17eab965a3e8d)
It adds a new remote crafted pretty easily with the old one and can choose all 10 channels plus 3 preset buttons: A, B, and C which can be configured for channels from other mods too!
I made this mod because I disliked the remote from the mod itself, I hope it helps you too!
